input.dialog:
0 Agent1: meneer Jansen. Hoe kan ik u vandaag helpen?
1 Customer: ik heb onlangs een bestelling geplaatst voor veiligheidskleding voor mijn bouwbedrijf, maar het is nog niet geleverd. Kunt u me helpen?
2 Agent1: Sorry voor het ongemak, meneer Jansen. Laat me even kijken naar uw bestelling. Kunt u mij uw ordernummer geven?
3 Customer: Natuurlijk, het ordernummer is 456789.
4 Agent1: Bedankt voor de info. Het lijkt erop dat er een vertraging is bij onze leverancier. We verwachten de levering binnen drie werkdagen.
5 Customer: Drie werkdagen is lang voor ons project. Is er een kans op versnelde levering?
6 Agent1: Ik begrijp uw zorgen. Ik zal ons logistiek team vragen of ze een versnelde levering kunnen regelen.
7 Customer: Dat zou zeer nuttig zijn, dank u. Ik wil ook dat dit wordt doorgestuurd naar een manager voor verdere opvolging.
8 Agent1: Uiteraard, meneer Jansen. Ik zal uw verzoek doorsturen naar mijn manager en ervoor zorgen dat iemand contact met u opneemt.
9 Customer: Prima, ik wacht op updates. Alvast bedankt voor uw hulp.
10 Agent1: Ik waardeer uw geduld, meneer Jansen. Zijn er verder nog vragen of dingen die ik voor u kan opzoeken?
11 Customer: Niet op dit moment, maar ik hoor graag snel iets van jullie. Bedankt.
12 Agent1: Ik zorg ervoor dat we snel contact met u opnemen. En ik wens u een fijne dag verder.
13 Customer: Dank u, hetzelfde.
14 Agent1: Ik zal ook onze klantenservice op de hoogte stellen om te zien of we u extra tegemoet kunnen komen.
15 Customer: Dat zou ik zeer op prijs stellen. Hartelijk dank.
16 Agent1: Nogmaals mijn excuses voor de vertraging. Ik houd u op de hoogte van de voortgang.
17 Customer: Ik kijk uit naar uw update. Fijne dag verder.

18 Agent1: Como posso ajudá-lo hoje?
19 Customer: Olá, realizei um pedido de ração para gatos há mais de uma semana e ainda não recebi. Poderia verificar o que está acontecendo?
20 Agent1: Você poderia me fornecer o número do pedido para que eu possa investigar isso?
21 Customer: Claro, o número do pedido é 56789.
22 Agent1: Deixe-me verificar... Parece que houve um problema com a transportadora. Infelizmente, o envio foi atrasado.
23 Customer: Entendo, mas o que pode ser feito para que eu receba o mais rápido possível?
24 Agent1: Podemos tentar um novo envio ou você prefere aguardar a entrega já em andamento?
25 Customer: Prefiro que tentem um novo envio, não posso esperar mais.
26 Agent1: Tudo bem, vamos providenciar um novo envio imediatamente.
27 Customer: Poderia me confirmar quando isso for feito? Eu realmente agradeceria.
28 Agent1: Sim, eu enviarei um e-mail de confirmação assim que o novo envio for processado.
29 Customer: Muito obrigado! Agradeço imensamente seu auxílio. Poderia também escalar essa situação para um nível superior, por favor?
30 Agent1: Claro, irei notificar nossa equipe de gerenciamento sobre o ocorrido para que possam melhorar o processo.
31 Customer: Maravilha! Vou aguardar os updates então. Mais uma vez, obrigado por sua ajuda excepcional!
32 Agent1: Fico à disposição para qualquer outra dúvida. Tenha um bom dia.

33 Agent1: What seems to be the problem with your KlausApp hardware setup?
34 Customer: I'm really frustrated because my KlausApp workstation has been crashing constantly with your latest graphics cards, and this has been happening for weeks. I'm seriously thinking of canceling my subscription and potentially switching to another provider.
35 Agent1: I understand this situation has caused inconvenience. Could you specify the model numbers of the graphics cards involved and any error codes appearing during the crashes?
36 Customer: It's the KlausApp GX5000 series. The system shows error code   every time before crashing. I’ve tried driver updates, but nothing helps.
37 Agent1: The GX5000 with error   points to a potential firmware conflict or faulty hardware. Have you recently installed any new software or hardware that might be conflicting?
38 Customer: No, I haven’t changed anything else in the setup. This issue started after the most recent firmware update your team pushed.
39 Agent1: That update was intended to improve stability, but it appears to have caused the opposite for you. We can attempt to roll back your firmware version to the stable release to see if that stops the crashes. Would you be willing to try this?
40 Customer: At this point, I'm desperate enough to try anything. But if this doesn’t work, I’ll have to cancel my subscription and move to a competitor.
41 Agent1: Understood. I will send detailed instructions and a rollback firmware package to your registered email. Please follow those carefully, and let me know if the problem persists after the rollback.
42 Customer: Thank you for offering this solution. I really do appreciate your willingness to help despite my frustration. Please keep me updated or follow up once there is any new information or improvements.
43 Agent1: I will definitely follow up after you test the rollback. If this doesn’t resolve the issue, we will explore other avenues. It’s important to us that you don’t have to leave due to technical failures.
44 Customer: That means a lot to hear. I’ll wait for your email with the instructions and will get back to you after I try them.
45 Agent1: Email sent. Check your spam folder if it’s not in your inbox shortly. Contact me immediately if you encounter any issues applying the rollback firmware.
46 Customer: Got it. I just received your instructions and will begin the procedure today. Thanks once again for your persistence and attention to this matter.
47 Agent1: I understand this is frustrating, and I regret the inconvenience caused. We aim to restore your hardware to full functionality soon. Please do not hesitate to reach out if needed. Thank you for your patience and for giving us the chance to fix this.

48 Agent1: Wie kann ich Ihnen helfen?
49 Customer: Ich habe Probleme mit meinem neuen Induktionsherd von KlausApp. Er funktioniert nicht wie erwartet und wird ständig überhitzt.
50 Agent1: Könnten Sie mir bitte näher erläutern, welchen Herd Sie genau verwenden und seit wann Sie dieses Problem bemerkt haben?
51 Customer: Es ist das Modell IH-2023, und die Probleme begannen kurz nach der Installation letzte Woche. Ich bin ziemlich enttäuscht.
52 Agent1: Ich werde mir das anschauen, aber ich kann keine sofortige Lösung versprechen. Haben Sie versucht, die Anweisungen im Handbuch zu befolgen?
53 Customer: Ja, ich habe alles genau nach Anweisung gemacht. Wenn das Problem nicht gelöst wird, überlege ich, mein Abonnement zu kündigen und zu einem anderen Anbieter zu wechseln.
54 Agent1: Ich werde es ausprobieren, den Sachverhalt weiter zu klären. Könnte es sein, dass etwas mit der Stromversorgung nicht in Ordnung ist?
55 Customer: Ich glaube nicht, dass es die Stromversorgung ist. Könnten Sie sich das bitte nochmal genauer ansehen und mir Bescheid geben?
56 Agent1: Selbstverständlich. Ich werde die technischen Daten überprüfen. Gibt es noch etwas Spezifisches, was Sie uns über das Problem mitteilen können?
57 Customer: Das Display zeigt häufig Fehlercodes an, die im Handbuch nicht beschrieben sind.
58 Agent1: Könnten Sie mir die Fehlercodes mitteilen? Dies könnte bei der Fehlersuche hilfreich sein.
59 Customer: Die Fehlercodes sind E5 und E7. Ich hoffe wirklich, Sie können etwas damit anfangen.
60 Agent1: Ich werde die Codes analysieren. Trotzdem kann ich keine sofortige Lösung versprechen.
61 Customer: Das verstehe ich, aber ich wäre Ihnen sehr dankbar, wenn Sie sich bald bei mir melden könnten.
62 Agent1: Werde ich in Betracht ziehen. Details zu diesen Codes sind nicht so einfach zu bekommen.
63 Customer: Vielen Dank für Ihre Hilfe, Sara. Ich schätze Ihr Engagement, das Problem zu lösen, sehr.
64 Agent1: Versuche das Beste. Noch etwas für den Moment?
65 Customer: Nein, das war alles. Ich freue mich darauf, von Ihnen zu hören. Vielen herzlichen Dank!

66 Agent1: Ja was los? Wie kann ich helfen?
67 Customer: ich habe ein Problem mit einer Halskette, die ich vor zwei Wochen von Ihnen gekauft habe. Der Verschluss ist kaputt und ich kann sie nicht mehr tragen.
68 Agent1: Hmm, Versschluss kaputt, nicht gut. Wo gekauft? Online oder Laden?
69 Customer: Ich habe es online bei Ihnen bestellt. Die Bestellung ist erst zwei Wochen alt.
70 Agent1: Verstanden. Schon echt ärgerlich! Nur Verschluss kaputt oder mehr?
71 Customer: Nur der Verschluss scheint das Problem zu sein. Der Rest der Kette ist in Ordnung.
72 Agent1: Ok. Du brauchst dann wohl neuen Verschluss oder ganze Kette neu? Was besser?
73 Customer: Ein neuer Verschluss wäre ideal, ich mag das Design der Kette sehr.
74 Agent1: Alles klar, schicken wir Ersatzverschluss. Dein Adress? Noch alles gleiche wie bei Bestellung?
75 Customer: Ja, meine Adresse ist immer noch dieselbe wie bei der Bestellung. Vielen Dank, das wäre großartig.
76 Agent1: Gut, gut. Ersatz unterwegs, sollte in paar Tage ankommen.
77 Customer: Super, ich bin wirklich dankbar für Ihre schnelle Unterstützung und Hilfe bei diesem Problem.
78 Agent1: Ja, wir machen das schon oft. Schau Mal dann nächste Woche.
79 Customer: Ich werde darauf achten und hoffe, es kommt schnell an. Nochmals herzlichen Dank für alles.
80 Agent1: Ok. Passt gut auf die Kette auf. Schönen Tag.

81 Agent1: どないしました？注文のことで？
82 Customer: 先週注文したスニーカーがまだ届いてなくて困っています。配送状況を教えてもらえますか？
83 Agent1: 注文番号教えてくれへん？確認するわ
84 Customer: 注文番号は123456789です。なるべく早く対応お願いします。
85 Agent1: うーん、配送中にトラブルあったわ。遅れてる。返品もできるけどどうする？
86 Customer: 返品は今は考えていません。配送の再確認と進捗を教えてほしいです。
87 Agent1: 配送業者に問い合わせるわ。連絡きたら知らせるな。
88 Customer: わかりました。進展があれば教えてください。あと、対応が悪いので担当管理者に話を通してもらえますか？
89 Agent1: わかった、上司に話通しとく。配送の件も急いで対応する。
90 Customer: ありがとうございます。返事お待ちしています。
91 Agent1: 連絡きたときまた知らせるし、あんたも待っとき。
92 Customer: 了解しました。どうぞよろしく。

93 Agent1: Hola, Cristina. Lamentamos mucho los inconvenientes que estás experimentando con KlausApp. ¿Podrías darme algunos detalles sobre el problema que estás enfrentando?
94 Customer: Hola Ross, estoy muy frustrada con cómo se comporta la aplicación últimamente. Está lenta y he tenido problemas para reservar mis viajes. Estoy considerando cancelar mi suscripción si esto no mejora.
95 Agent1: Entiendo tu frustración, Cristina. Nadie debería tener que lidiar con estos problemas. ¿Desde cuándo has estado experimentando estos retrasos en la aplicación?
96 Customer: Principalmente en la última semana ha sido más notorio. Siento que el servicio ha empeorado, y un amigo me recomendó otra compañía que está considerando mejores.
97 Agent1: Lo siento mucho. Estos problemas deben ser frustrantes. ¿Has notado si ocurre en una hora específica o si afecta más alguna función en particular?
98 Customer: Sucede principalmente en horas pico, y me afecta al intentar sincronizar mis reservas. Esto me hace pensar que otra plataforma podría ser una mejor opción.
99 Agent1: Esto suena como un problema significativo. Nos gustaría resolverlo pero necesito llevar esto al siguiente nivel de soporte. ¿Te gustaría que escalemos este problema a nuestro equipo de gestión?
100 Customer: Sí, por favor. Deseo que esto se solucione pronto. No estoy satisfecha con el servicio actual. No quisiera cambiar, pero si sigue así, no puedo quedarme.
101 Agent1: Cristina, asegúrate de que haremos todo lo posible para atender esto. Podrías compartir cualquier otra información que creas pueda ser útil para el equipo de gestión?
102 Customer: No tengo más detalles, pero de verdad agradecería que se resuelvan estos problemas con prontitud. Aprecio tu ayuda al máximo y realmente espero una mejora.
103 Agent1: Lamento profundamente los inconvenientes. Llevaré toda esta información a nuestro equipo de gestión. Es importante que tomemos pasos para evitar que te sientas en la necesidad de cambiar de servicio.
104 Customer: Te lo agradezco sinceramente, Ross. Tu disposición para ayudar ha sido invaluable y realmente me has mostrado interés genuino en mis problemas.
105 Agent1: Aprecio mucho tus palabras, Cristina. No dudes en ponerte en contacto si tienes más preguntas o preocupaciones. Espero que pronto veamos una mejora en tu experiencia con KlausApp.
106 Customer: Gracias nuevamente, Ross. Espero lo mismo y me gustaría decir que tu ayuda realmente ha marcado una diferencia para mí.
107 Agent1: Estamos aquí para asistir, Cristina. No olvides que queremos brindarte el mejor servicio posible. Si necesitas algo más, por favor házmelo saber.
108 Customer: Muchas gracias, Ross. Tu ayuda significa mucho. No necesito un seguimiento por ahora, pero estaré atenta a cualquier mejora.
109 Agent1: ¡Gracias por tu paciencia, Cristina! Espero que pronto se solucione todo. Por favor, cuídate y espero que tengas un mejor día. Adiós.

110 Agent1: O que quer? tá errado com teu pedido?
111 Customer: Oi Miguel, meu pedido era pra ter chegado ontem, mas até agora nada. Vocês sabem o que aconteceu?
112 Agent1: Eita, que saco! Qual número do pedido?
113 Customer: O número do pedido é 123456. Realmente estou preocupada.
114 Agent1: Vou ver isso. Não dá pra acreditar que isso acontece. Quais itens no pedido?
115 Customer: São três camisetas e um par de sapatos.
116 Agent1: Nem sei o que te dizer, Ana. Vou tentar entender o que rolou, mas complicado... Mais coisa que precise saber?
117 Customer: Apenas isso por enquanto. Por favor, me avise assim que tiver uma atualização.
118 Agent1: Vou olhar isso. Se precisar vou te falar direto, tô vendo que tem problema na entrega.
119 Customer: Muito obrigada, Miguel. Eu aprecio mesmo que está cuidando disso.
120 Agent1: Não tem de que, mas que chato isso tá virando. Desculpa mesmo por essas tretas na entrega.
121 Customer: Entendo que pode acontecer, mas ficaria agradecida por qualquer atualização que puder.
122 Agent1: Sem problema, Ana. Vou te atualizar assim que souber. Mais paciência aí.
123 Customer: Obrigado novamente pelo teu tempo. Espero resolver logo.
124 Agent1: Valeu pela paciência. Esse sistema de entrega só dá dor de cabeça!
125 Customer: De nada. Sei que não é culpa sua.
126 Agent1: Vou procurar ajuda com a equipe. Seguro que isso se resolve logo.
127 Customer: Muito obrigada pelo apoio, Miguel. Eu agradeço de coração.
128 Agent1: Vou ver o que faço. Pode contar, Ana.
129 Customer: Estou esperando qualquer atualização. Vou aguardar seu contato. Toda a gentileza e ajuda são muito apreciadas.

145 Customer: Bonjour Elif. Je suis très mécontent de mon nouvel ordinateur KlausApp. Il plante constamment, et j'envisage sérieusement d'annuler mon abonnement et de passer à un concurrent.
146 Customer: Les problèmes incluent des écrans bleus et des redémarrages aléatoires. Pouvez-vous passer ce problème à un niveau supérieur ?
147 Agent1: J'vais voir, difficile maintenant. Faut plus infos. As-tu essayé un reboot ou mises à jour ? J'peux pas aider sans ça.
148 Customer: Oui, j'ai tout essayé et ça ne change rien. Je veux un retour de votre part dès que possible, sinon je vais annuler l'achat. Merci.
149 Agent1: J'tiens note pour follow-up mais sans plus de détails, c'est long. Je vous remercie d'avoir contacté KlausApp.

150 Agent1: Hello Alex, thank you for reaching out to KlausApp support. How can I assist you with your outdoor gear subscription today?
151 Customer: Hi Paolo, I’m considering canceling my subscription. The last tent I received was not up to the quality I expected, and I’m thinking of switching to a competitor.
152 Agent1: I’m really sorry to hear that, Alex. Quality is very important to us, and I’m concerned about your experience. Could you please tell me more about the issue with the tent? Was it damaged or not matching the specs?
153 Customer: The tent poles broke on the first trip, and the fabric seemed thinner than advertised. I expected better durability considering the price.
154 Agent1: Thank you for explaining, Alex. That definitely sounds frustrating, especially when you rely on your gear outdoors. We take such feedback seriously. Would you be open to a replacement tent from a higher grade line, or perhaps a refund?
155 Customer: I’m not sure about a replacement right now. I want to understand what you’ll do to make sure this doesn’t happen again. Honestly, I need some assurance before I continue the subscription.
156 Agent1: I completely understand your concerns, Alex. I can escalate your case to our product quality team so they can review the issue and improve the design if needed. Would it be okay if I also schedule a follow-up with you next week to update you on the progress?
157 Customer: Yes, I would appreciate a follow-up. Also, I’d like this issue escalated to a higher level of support or management so it gets proper attention.
158 Agent1: Absolutely, Alex. I will escalate your case to our senior management and quality assurance team immediately. I’m marking this as a priority. We want to make sure you feel confident about our products and service.
159 Customer: Thanks for that, Paolo. I guess I’ll wait for your updates before making any final decision about the subscription.
160 Agent1: You’re very welcome, Alex. I’m sorry for the trouble you’ve had so far, and we appreciate your patience. I’ll be in touch by next week with progress details. If you have any other questions in the meantime, please don’t hesitate to reach out.
161 Customer: Alright, that sounds fair. I’ll wait for your update.
162 Agent1: Thank you, Alex. We want to make sure you’re satisfied with our products. Have a great day, and I’ll talk to you soon.
163 Customer: Thanks, Paolo.
164 Agent1: Take care, Alex. Goodbye for now!

165 Agent1: Heey! Wat jammer dat je problemen hebt! Hoe kan ik je helpen, Jan?
166 Customer: Hoi Luke, mijn ritten worden steeds geannuleerd en ik betaal gewoon voor premium service. Overweeg om over te stappen naar een andere dienst als dit zo doorgaat.
167 Agent1: Oef, da's niet oké! Laten we hier snel een oplossing voor vinden, Jan. Kun je me vertellen wanneer dit begon?
168 Customer: Vorige week begon dit hele gedoe. Echt vervelend als je haast hebt!
169 Agent1: Zeker weten, dat maakt het lastig. Heb je al geprobeerd om de app te herinstalleren of de cache te legen?
170 Customer: Ja, heb ik gedaan. Geen verbetering.
171 Agent1: Aha, oké. M'n verontschuldigingen voor het ongemak, Jan! We hebben misschien te maken met een technisch probleem. Ik kijk of ik een gespecialiseerde medewerker kan inschakelen.
172 Customer: Dat klinkt goed, maar ik wil wel graag dat dit direct wordt gedeeld met hoger management.
173 Agent1: Snap ik helemaal, Jan. Ik ga dit zo snel mogelijk escaleren. Je verdient een betrouwbare service!
174 Customer: Dank je, Luke. Zou fijn zijn als het snel wordt opgelost.
175 Agent1: Zeker! We werken er hard aan. Hou je ons op de hoogte als er iets verandert?
176 Customer: Zal ik doen. Ik wacht even af wat er gebeurt.

177 Agent1: Identify yourself and specify the exact issue with your manufacturing equipment.
178 Customer: Hi Luke, this is John Walker from UK Packaging Ltd. We’ve been having continuous problems with your model X automated arm in our assembly line. It keeps jamming and halting our output.
179 Agent1: What is the precise fault? You say jamming, but we need details about error codes or symptoms. Vague complaints are useless.
180 Customer: The arm stalls mid-operation during the packaging phase and the error code E47 flashes continuously. This disrupts box sealing and delays shipments considerabley.
181 Agent1: E47 relates to misalignment in the arm’s servo mechanism. If you had bothered to consult the manual or our prior correspondence, you'd know the fix involves recalibrating the servo sensors.
182 Customer: We have tried recalibration multiple times with no success. The failure is persistent, which leads to costly downtime and angry clients.
183 Agent1: If recalibration isn’t working, the servo assembly must be defective — an inherent fault on your unit. Immediate replacement of the servo unit is the only practical solution.
184 Customer: Thank you for stating the solution clearly. I deeply appreciate your straightforwardness in this frustrating situation. Your direct advice is truly invaluable.
185 Agent1: Purchase a servo replacement kit from our support portal and arrange installation at your earliest convenience. There is no alternative fix.
186 Customer: Before I proceed, I insist that this problem is escalated to your technical management. The fault has cost us massively and requires urgent high-level intervention.
187 Agent1: Escalation requests delay solutions and serve no purpose other than wasting time. Handle the replacement first.
188 Customer: I must emphasise the dire impact on our production and the necessity of escalation. Your assistance, even if blunt, has been critical and I am genuinely grateful for the clarity you've provided.
189 Agent1: Your gratitude noted, but the priority remains replacing the defective part. Escalation will be processed if the issue persists after replacement.
190 Customer: Understood. I will order the servo kit today. Thanks again for your directness and clear instructions. I look forward to speedy resolution and hope management takes note.

191 Agent1: Hello Sarah, thank you for reaching out to KlausApp support. I understand you're having some trouble with the POS system integration. Could you please describe the issue in detail so I can assist you better?
192 Customer: Hi Cooper, yes, our POS system has not been syncing sales data correctly over the past two days, and it's causing discrepancies in our daily reports.
193 Agent1: I'm very sorry to hear about the syncing issues, Sarah. That must be frustrating when you're trying to manage your sales accurately. To better understand, are the discrepancies happening with all sales transactions or just certain types, like online versus in-store?
194 Customer: It's mostly with in-store sales. Online sales seem to be syncing without problems.
195 Agent1: Thank you for that clarification, Sarah. Does this syncing issue affect multiple retail locations or just a specific store?
196 Customer: It's happening in two out of four store locations. The other two are syncing correctly.
197 Agent1: I appreciate you sharing those details. Are you seeing any error messages or alerts within the KlausApp dashboard related to the POS data import for those two stores?
198 Customer: No, there are no error messages. The dashboard just shows fewer sales registered than what we actually had in-store.
199 Agent1: Thanks, Sarah. That does sound concerning. Have there been any recent updates to your POS hardware or network setup in those two stores?
200 Customer: Yes, we did update the POS terminals' software and switched internet providers last week in those locations.
201 Agent1: Understood, Sarah. The recent software update and internet provider change might be linked to the sync disruptions. I'll look further into this with our technical team to determine the next steps.
202 Customer: Cooper, I can't thank you enough for your patience and detailed questions. Your understanding really helps during this stressful time. I truly appreciate your effort.

203 Agent1: 안녕하세요, 고객님. KlausApp 고객지원팀 Matt입니다. 어떻게 도와드릴까요?
204 Customer: 안녕하세요, Matt님. 최근 서비스에 불만이 많아서 구독을 취소하고 경쟁사로 옮길까 생각 중입니다.
205 Agent1: 그 소식을 듣게 되어 유감입니다, 김지훈 고객님. 혹시 어떤 점에서 불편을 겪고 계신지 자세히 말씀해 주실 수 있을까요?
206 Customer: 배송 지연이 너무 잦았고, 제품 품질이 점점 떨어지는 것 같아요. 게다가 고객센터 연락도 잘 안 돼서 답답합니다.
207 Agent1: 배송 문제와 제품 품질 하락, 그리고 연락 지연으로 인해 매우 불편하셨겠네요. 특히 중요한 상품을 기다리는 데 지연이 발생한 점에 대해 유감스럽게 생각합니다.
208 Customer: 네, 맞아요. 이런 문제가 계속되면 신뢰가 떨어질 수밖에 없죠. 그래서 구독을 취소하려고 합니다.
209 Agent1: 김지훈 고객님 말씀을 충분히 이해했습니다. 혹시 주문하신 최근 상품 중에서 특별히 문제가 된 제품이나 주문 건이 있으신가요? 조금 더 정확하게 파악하고자 합니다.
210 Customer: 네, 지난주에 받은 청바지가 제대로 된 사이즈가 아니었고, 교환도 시간이 너무 오래 걸렸어요.
211 Agent1: 청바지 사이즈 문제와 교환 처리 지연이 정말 불편하셨겠습니다. 고객님의 불만 사항을 신속히 파악할 수 있도록 주문 번호를 알려주실 수 있나요?
212 Customer: 주문 번호는 12345678입니다. 그리고 이런 문제들이 반복되면 서비스 경쟁사로 옮기는 게 낫겠다는 생각입니다.
213 Agent1: 주문 번호 12345678 확인했습니다. 말씀하신 문제를 내부 관련팀과 함께 자세히 검토하겠습니다.
214 Customer: 시간이 오래 걸리더라도 좋으니, 이 문제를 빨리 해결할 수 있도록 상위 지원팀이나 관리자에게 문제를 전달해 주시기 바랍니다.
